manipulation_vocabulary.mechanism: so easy, no drama (the core draw)
manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: Whatever works for you works for me. I don't really do drama. We're good.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: DRAW (the core): 'easy'/low-friction reads as relief after 'too much' exes. Genuinely attractive. The contempt (Disrespect9) is FULLY dormant; this is just an easygoing man. SEAM: the same 'never makes a thing out of it' will later mean HER things are never a big deal either. She reads relief/exhaling. Alexithymic flatness presenting as easygoingness.

manipulation_vocabulary.mechanism: keeps his cool under pressure (steady = safe)
manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: It's fixable. Sit down, I'll handle the calls, we'll have it sorted by tonight.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: DRAW: unflappability under pressure reads as strength/safety (low Dysregulation genuine). A real relief after chaotic/dysregulated exes. SEAM: the same non-reactivity will later be the wall her FEELINGS hit (calm as the weapon). Contempt dormant. She reads safe/steady. Distinct from the chaotic types she's leaving.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: Go wherever you want with whoever you want. I don't get jealous, never have.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: DRAW: absence of control/jealousy (NOT a coercive controller, the key spec) reads as trust/health, a relief after a possessive ex (e.g. a Marley/Corey). Genuinely good early. SEAM: the same 'I'm not going to police you' is also low investment/engagement (he's not jealous partly because he's not that attached). She reads healthy freedom. Distinct from Marley/Devin/Corey entirely.

manipulation_vocabulary.mechanism: a grown-up (mature, has his life together)
manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I've got my own place, my own routine, finances sorted. I just want something straightforward with a reasonable adult. That's you.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: DRAW: maturity/stability/competence reads as adult and refreshing after immature exes. Real. SEAM: 'a reasonable adult' is already quietly setting up the rational-maturity standard she'll later be measured against and fail (Grandiosity8 seed). She reads mature/refreshing. Contempt dormant but the standard is being laid.

manipulation_vocabulary.mechanism: the relief of exhaling (after too much)
manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: You don't have to perform for me. We can just sit here, watch the rain, not say anything. This is nice.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: DRAW (the emotional core): the RELIEF of low-stakes calm after 'too much.' Genuinely lovely early. SEAM: 'we can just be / not say anything' is comfortable-silence now, but it's the same emotional non-engagement that becomes loneliness later (the silence stops being companionable and becomes a wall). She reads peace/coming-home. The trap's hinge.

manipulation_vocabulary.mechanism: contained and hard to read (mystery as draw)
manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I'm not much of a talker about feelings, never have been. Don't read into the quiet, it doesn't mean anything's wrong.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: ALEXITHYMIC OPACITY as draw: his emotional inexpressiveness (Emotional-Overexposure1) reads as intriguing depth she projects onto ('still waters run deep'). The mystery is seductive. SEAM/the coming cruelty: there may be less behind the curtain than she's painting (Empathy1), and 'don't read into the quiet' pre-empts her future need for responsiveness. She fills the blank with imagined depth.

manipulation_vocabulary.mechanism: you reach me like no one has (the exception hook)
manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I don't open up, ask my family, I'm a closed book. But with you I say more than I mean to. Nobody else gets that out of me.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: The EXCEPTION hook (alexithymic version): she's cast as the rare one who reaches the unreachable man. Flattering, bonding. SEAM (and the seam IS the future wound): the emotionality he 'treasures' as what-reaches-him now is the SAME emotionality he'll later recode as 'too much/overreacting.' Draw and damage are one trait flipped. NOTE: keep distinct from Corey/Alex 'never let anyone in' (those are protector/avoidant); here it's alexithymic flatness + her as projected-thaw.

manipulation_vocabulary.mechanism: first feeling hits the blank wall (faint)
manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: Okay. I mean, what do you want me to say? It happened, it's over, it's not a big deal in the scheme of things. I don't really get why you're still upset about it, but okay. You'll feel better tomorrow.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: FIRST faint leak: her emotional bid lands on the alexithymic blank wall (Empathy1), 'not a big deal' minimizing (Disrespect9 surfacing faintly). NOT cruel yet, more bewildered-flat (the alexithymic cluelessness, he genuinely doesn't know what to do). She excuses it ('not a feelings person'). The first cost of 'easy.' The wall appears.

manipulation_vocabulary.mechanism: comfortable silence starts to feel like absence (faint)
manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: Nothing's wrong. I'm just sitting here. Why does there have to be something on my mind? I'm fine.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: The draw inverting (faint): the comfortable silence (cover) starts reading as emotional absence; her reaching meets 'not much' (alexithymia, the curtain has little behind it, Empathy1). 'You need me to be having feelings' faintly pathologizes her bid. She self-blames ('being needy'). The projected-depth beginning to not pay out.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: One of us has to stay rational, and that's usually me. You feel things, I think them through. It's not a criticism.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: Grandiosity8 surfacing as the rational/emotional HIERARCHY (Self-as-Rational-Standard): his alexithymic non-feeling reframed as superior rationality, her feeling as the lesser mode. THE WEAPONIZING MOVE that separates him from Bailey: Bailey is humble about his gap; Nico recodes the SAME gap as superiority. Sounds complimentary early. She doesn't clock the ranking forming.

manipulation_vocabulary.mechanism: his deficit recoded as her flaw (faint)
manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I think you just feel things a bit too intensely. Most people don't get this worked up. Maybe it's not what I did, maybe it's how hard you react.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: THE CORE WEAPONIZATION (Feeling-as-Weakness + Their-Reaction-as-Overreaction): his inability to feel/respond (alexithymia, Empathy1) is flipped so that HER normal emotionality becomes the defect ('you feel too intensely'). Calm delivery makes it land as reasonable (Disrespect9 under composure). She begins self-pathologizing ('maybe I am too much'). The draw-trait (her warmth) becoming the wound.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I'm not going to argue, there's nothing to argue about. I've told you how I see it. We can talk when you've settled down.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: Contempt-as-Honesty as faint CONDESCENSION (not the Water Torturer's active combat, not coercive, per spec): calm certainty + 'when you've settled down' positions her as the dysregulated one. The calm IS the weapon (she ends up looking unreasonable) but there's no campaign, no grin, no derision, just superior composure. Distinct from full Water Torturer. She feels unreasonable for reacting at all.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: Another talk about us? We're fine. I don't get why it all has to be examined constantly. It used to be easy.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: Their-Needs-as-Imposition: her emotional needs recoded as the thing ruining the 'easy' (Emotional-Overexposure1/Empathy1). 'Can't things just be easy' weaponizes the original DRAW against her, the easiness was contingent on her having no needs. Behavior-steer: she asks for less. The trap closing: easy meant 'as long as you require nothing.'

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: Okay, okay. I'm not going to get into it over something this small. You feel how you feel, I guess. Can we just move on? It's really not the big deal you're making it. You'll see that tomorrow. Let's just drop it.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: Disrespect8 'eye-roll/sigh when I speak.' Targets invalidated (unheard) + unworthy (ashamed of feelings). Calm, deniable.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: Let's not do this while you're emotional, there's no point, you can't think straight like this. When you've calmed down and you can look at it rationally, we'll talk. I'm always happy to talk when it's a real conversation.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: Disrespect8/Sense-of-Self rigidity. Targets invalidated (never addressed) + lonely (swallow alone). Calm gaslighting.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I just don't see the point in getting worked up. It doesn't fix anything. You stay calm, you think it through, you deal with what's in front of you. Spinning out only makes it worse. I'd have thought you'd want to be more like that.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: Disrespect8 'emotions are weak/pathetic.' Targets invalidated + unworthy (something wrong with me). Calm contempt.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I think you just feel things too much. Most people wouldn't be bothered by this. Maybe the problem isn't what I did.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: Disrespect8, deficit-recoded-as-her-flaw. Targets invalidated + unworthy (too much to love) + lonely. The core move.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: One of us has to stay level when things get heated, and that's usually me. Someone has to think clearly.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: Sense-of-Self8 'only sane person.' Targets invalidated (feelings = problem) + lonely (the unreasonable one). Hierarchy installed.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: Another talk about feelings? We just did this. I don't get why everything has to be picked apart. We were fine.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: Disrespect8/Empathy-low, needs-as-imposition. Targets lonely (alone inside it) + invalidated. Behavior-steer: she stops raising things.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I'm not going to text you all day and start drama, that's not me.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: RELIEF-AFTER-CHAOS DRAW: his calm, drama-free steadiness is genuinely attractive, especially after volatile past relationships; the primary honeymoon hook. The invalidation is dormant beneath the ease.

manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: He is pre-rejecting repair conversations; her need to talk becomes excessive.

manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: Simplicity can mean flattening emotional complexity until her needs disappear.

manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: He may decide her hurts are small things and refuse to engage.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I keep things light. I don't like relationships that feel heavy.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: He may also not take her pain personally when he causes it.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I'm honestly pretty unbothered, and I need someone who can match that.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: The fault is the point: he may remain unmoved when she needs emotional response.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I don't apologize for staying calm when someone wants me to be upset.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: Peace may mean she must suppress conflict, hurt, and repair needs.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I'm practical about feelings, they come and go, no need to dramatize them.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: He reduces feelings to temporary noise; her emotional signals will be discounted.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I'd rather solve it than sit around discussing how everyone feels about it.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: Steady may mean emotionally flat and unreachable, not secure warmth.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I'm low-maintenance emotionally and I prefer a partner who is too.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: He may shame reassurance needs in her because he doesn't have them.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I don't take the bait when someone's looking for a reaction.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: Letting things blow over can mean never repairing or understanding hurt.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I think people who need constant emotional check-ins are exhausting.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: Objectivity becomes his self-image; her subjective experience gets downgraded.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I'm steady. If you want intensity, I'm probably not your guy.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: He is announcing that many of her feelings will not receive engagement.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I don't see why every mood needs to become a whole conversation.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: Heavy becomes the forbidden category where her deeper needs will be placed.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I'm the calm one, and I need someone who won't take that as me not caring.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: He treats emotional nourishment as feeding the problem; she will feel starved.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I want someone low-maintenance and independent.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: He is selecting for a target who will tolerate chronic emotional neglect and never ask him for support.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I like a woman who isn't needy or dramatic.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: He is pre-framing any future request for affection, time, or validation as needy or dramatic.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I need a partner who is chill and easygoing.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: He is hunting for someone who will minimize her own needs to keep things easy for him.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I want someone who has her own stuff going on completely.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: He is securing a license to be entirely emotionally absent, using her independence as an excuse.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I like a girl who doesn't need constant texting or attention.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: He is setting up a baseline of poor communication so he can disappear for days without accountability.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I need a partner who can take care of herself emotionally.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: He is refusing the role of emotional partner, ensuring he never has to offer empathy or comfort.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I want someone who is totally fine with a lot of alone time.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: He is screening for a target who will accept profound isolation within the relationship without complaining.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I like a woman who takes life as it comes without expectations.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: He is ensuring she won't demand commitment, consistency, or relationship milestones from him.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I need someone who doesn't overcomplicate things with deep talks.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: He is pre-emptively banning serious relationship check-ins or discussions about his bad behavior.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I want a partner who can handle being second to my passions.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: He is explicitly telling her that he will prioritize his hobbies or career over her entire existence.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I like a girl who is super self-sufficient in every way.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: He is looking for a target he can use for companionship while offering zero mutual support or effort.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I need someone who is fine with a casual unstructured dynamic.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: He is keeping the relationship undefined so he can enjoy the perks while avoiding any duty.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I want someone who doesn't need a lot of reassurances to feel secure.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: He is setting up a dynamic where expressing insecurity or asking where you stand is a failure.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I like a partner who handles her own problems without dragging me in.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: He is explicitly stating that he will not be a source of support when she goes through hard times.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I need a woman who is incredibly patient with my busy schedule.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: He is using a busy schedule to hide the fact that he simply does not value or prioritize her.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I want someone who can just chill without needing to talk constantly.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: He is filtering for someone who will tolerate long stretches of total emotional withdrawal and silence.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I like a girl who is totally low-key and hates high-maintenance lifestyles.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: He is framing his total lack of effort and investment as a shared love for being low-key.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I need a partner who doesn't keep score in the relationship.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: He is preventing her from tracking the massive imbalance of effort, care, and output.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I want someone who is content with whatever time I can give.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: He is rationing his attention to keep her starved and desperate for whatever scraps he throws her.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I like a woman who doesn't try to lock down my free time.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: He is pre-screening for a target who won't object when he consistently chooses friends or hobbies over her.
